first_run.rationale: The score remained unchanged, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions consistently identify the same strengths (entrepreneurial spirit, technical breadth) and the same concerns (lack of strategic leadership, no advanced AI degree). The minor variations in phrasing and the specific technologies mentioned are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any meaningful shift in assessment based on the change in location from Berlin to Bucharest.
